channel.title: Udacity on Qianqian Shan
channel.description: Recent content in Udacity on Qianqian Shan

item.title: A/B Testing
item.description: Table of contents Overview Policy and Ethics for Experiments Choosing and Characterizing Metrics Designing of Experiment Analyzing Results Overview Choose a metric Review statistics Design Analyze 0 - Definition of A/B testing A general methodology used online when you want to test a new product or a feature using control/experiment sets of users. 1 - A/B testing can do A/B testing can do a wide variety of things such as
